body:
Title: Revenu Quebec Schedule N 2025 adjustment of investment expenses.

Source:
- https://www.revenuquebec.ca/en/online-services/forms-and-publications/current-details/tp-1-v/
- https://www.revenuquebec.ca/documents/en/formulaires/tp/2025-12/TP-1.D.N-V%282025-12%29.pdf

Schedule N numeric source values for encoded amounts, rates, thresholds, caps, and limits:
Value: 50
Value: 0.50

Schedule N Part A calculates investment expenses. Line 10 is loss from a partnership of which the taxpayer was a specified member. Line 12 is carrying charges and interest expenses from TP-1 line 231. Line 14 is the deduction for exploration and development expenses. Line 16 is other expenses incurred to earn property income. Line 18 adds lines 10 through 16.

Part B calculates investment income. Line 20 is dividends from taxable Canadian corporations from TP-1 line 128. Line 22 is interest and other investment income from TP-1 line 130. Line 24 is income from a partnership of which the taxpayer was a specified member. Line 26 is income accrued under a life insurance policy from RL-3 box J. Line 28 is recovery of resource deductions multiplied by 50%. Line 30 is ordinary annuities from RL-2 box B if code RO appears. Line 32 is other property income allocated by a trust and property income allocated to shareholders. Line 34 is taxable capital gains. Line 36 adds lines 20 through 34. Line 40 subtracts line 36 from line 18, floors the result at zero, and carries the adjustment of investment expenses to TP-1 line 260.

Part C calculates other investment expenses. Line 50 is limited partnership loss included on TP-1 line 289. Line 52 is net capital losses from other years. Line 54 adds lines 50 and 52. Line 56 is the amount from line 36 and line 58 is the amount from line 18. Line 60 subtracts line 58 from line 56 and floors the result at zero. Line 64 subtracts line 60 from line 54, floors the result at zero, and carries the adjustment of other investment expenses to TP-1 line 276.

Part D calculates the amount that can be carried forward. Line 70 is the unused portion of the adjustment of investment expenses. Line 72 is the amount from line 40. Line 74 is the amount from line 64. Line 76 adds lines 70 through 74. Line 78 is the amount from TP-1 line 252. Line 80 subtracts line 78 from line 76 and gives the amount that can be carried forward.
